title: Slim Totem Players
description: This Resource Pack make so your Totem is your Player Skin, but in Slim. SkinMC already made this, but only for Wide Skins.
body: ![The Banner Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afdded935885daa825f567387b4cd43961280558.png)This Resource Pack make so your Totem is your Player Skin, but in Slim. SkinMC already made this, but only for Wide Skins. You only need to extract the zip file, when go into the new Folder and go to the textures, when change the Alex skin to your skin AND do not forgot to change the name of your skin in the Folder to:"totem_of_undying.png" Here is the Totem maker from [SkinMC](https://skinmc.net/totem). MCTools has also a newer Generator with Slim and Bedrock Support, click [here](https://mc-tools.net/totem).
